title: Cost Optimization & Bin-Packing
description: Analyze Kubernetes cost optimization strategies, including bin-packing and resource request tuning. Utilize cost analysis tools like Kubecost to identify orphaned resources and reduce cloud expenditure.
objectives: Analyze Kubernetes cost optimization strategies, including bin-packing and resource request tuning.
Utilize cost analysis tools like Kubecost to identify orphaned resources and reduce cloud expenditure.
